translation_text.kp2:1.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from killing living creatures.
translation_text.kp2:2.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from stealing.
translation_text.kp2:3.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from sexual activity.
translation_text.kp2:4.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from lying.
translation_text.kp2:5.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from consuming beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.kp2:6.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from food at the wrong time.
translation_text.kp2:7.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from seeing shows of dancing, singing, and music .
translation_text.kp2:8.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from attiring and adorning myself with garlands, fragrance, and makeup.
translation_text.kp2:9.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from high and luxurious beds.
translation_text.kp2:10.1: I undertake the precept to refrain from receiving gold and currency.
